$comment: AUTHORITATIVE. FROZEN class (ADR-0012) — ANY change to this file requires a new ADR (ADR-0012 frozen-class amendment pattern, cf. ADR-0013 rev.2). registry.json frozen_authority_adr = ADR-0013. Implements ADR-0013 (event envelope v1: 9 common fields + context_type discriminator + rev.2 payload as 10th structural member) and ADR-0013 rev.2 amendments (payload required-all-branches; occurred_at Z-canonical only; schema_version prerelease/build excluded; tenant-branch run_id required). Supersedes tests/contract/fixtures/envelope/draft-envelope.schema.json (W0 non-authoritative bootstrap, retired in the same commit that lands this file — no $id double-claim window). UUIDv7 pattern on event_id (version nibble '7', variant nibble in 8/9/a/b) is a structural addition on top of the draft's format:uuid — the RFC 9562 UUID text layout is 8-4-4-4-12 hex groups; the 4th group is 4 hex characters total (1 variant nibble + 3 following hex digits), matching the [89ab][0-9a-f]{3} form used below.
title: SAENA event envelope v1
description: Implements ADR-0013 event envelope v1 (9 common fields + context_type discriminator: tenant | system | aggregate) and ADR-0013 rev.2 (payload as 10th structural member, required in all branches; occurred_at Z-canonical; schema_version prerelease/build excluded; tenant branch run_id required).

event_id.description: UUIDv7, sortable event identifier. Version nibble fixed to 7, variant nibble in {8,9,a,b} per RFC 9562.

schema_version.$comment: Prerelease/build metadata explicitly excluded (ADR-0013 rev.2 ③) — MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH pure form only, no -rc./+build suffixes.
schema_version.description: semver contract version (ADR-0012 compatibility policy target).

occurred_at.$comment: Z-canonical only (ADR-0013 rev.2 ②) — +00:00 numeric offset form is rejected. Delegated to common/identifiers so the Z-canonical pattern has one authoritative source.

event_type.description: 9th field (ADR-0013 deviation from k3s §4.1 8-field list). Identical to AsyncAPI topic name.

payload.$comment: 10th structural member (ADR-0013 rev.2 ①) — required in ALL context_type branches. Empty object ({}) is a valid minimal value for producers with no domain payload yet at publish time.

engine_id.description: Closed enum, v1 single value (ADR-0013). Required for observation/citation/experiment event families; present here as an optional property so non-engine events remain valid. Any value outside the enum (e.g. Google/Gemini) is rejected at the schema level (CLAUDE.md Engine scope v1).

tenant_id.description: Required for tenant context (ADR-0013, ADR-0014 slug format).

run_id.description: Required for tenant context (ADR-0013 rev.2 ④ — Open decisions item 1 closed: tenant branch run_id stays required, not nullable).

lineage_audit_ref.$comment: Hash format OPEN (ADR-0013:73 open decision carried forward unresolved into v1 — opaque string only, no format constraint imposed here).
lineage_audit_ref.description: Opaque audit-ledger hash reference. Audit-role-only viewing at the application layer; schema cannot enforce access control.
